characters.name: Drew Dunbar
characters.description: Drew DunbarBiographical informationMarital statusSingleFamilyJulia(ex-wife)Maddie(daughter)OccupationTherapistPhysical descriptionGenderMaleStatusAliveBehind the scenesFirst appearancePilotLast appearanceJuneau, Froyo and Mario KartPortrayed byThomas Middleditch Drew Dunbaris the protagonist in (Season 1) and deuteragonist (Season 2) onB Positive. He is played byThomas Middleditch. Drew is a therapist and father ofMaddie. Recently divorced from his wife,Julia, Drew is faced with finding a kidney donor when he runs intoGina Dabrowski, a rough-around-the-edges woman from his past who volunteers her own.[1]

characters.name: Eli Russell
characters.description: Eli RussellBiographical informationOccupationFootball playerPhysical descriptionGenderMaleBehind the scenesFirst appearancePilotPortrayed byTerrence Terrell Eli Russellis a main character inB Positive. He is played byTerrence Terrell. Eli is a friendly, outgoing professional football player for the Seahawks. A ladies man with a bit of an ego, Eli is proud of his career. After several incidents on the field, Eli was sent to dialysis in need of a new kidney from his brother. While he waits for his brother to lose weight so he can be his donor, Eli meets Drew in dialysis, and they start an unlikely friendship.[1]

characters.name: Gabby
characters.description: GabbyBiographical informationMarital statusSingleOccupationAssistant managerJewelry designerBartenderPhysical descriptionGenderFemaleBehind the scenesFirst appearancePilotPortrayed byKether Donohue Gabbyis a main character inB Positive. She is played byKether Donohue.[1] Gabby is the best friend ofGina, a party girl who juggles multiple jobs. Her jobs consist of assistant manager at a retail clothing store, jewelry designer, and bartender.[2]

characters.name: Gideon
characters.description: GideonBiographical informationResidenceValley HillsMarital statusGayOccupationNursePhysical descriptionGenderMaleStatusAliveBehind the scenesFirst appearanceDie AlysisPortrayed byDarryl Stephens Gideonis a main character inB Positive. He is played byDarryl Stephens. He is an empathetic gay nurse who works at the dialysis center. He cares deeply about the people to whom he gives treatment, often getting involved in their personal lives. There is a recurring theme of Gideon referring to himself in the third-person. In second season, he becomes head nurse at the Valley Hills.

characters.name: Gina Dabrowski
characters.description:
Gina DabrowskiBiographical informationMarital statusSingleFamilyUnnamed motherNatalie (sister)OccupationDeuteragonist (former)Physical descriptionGenderFemaleStatusAliveBehind the scenesFirst appearancePilotLast appearanceJuneau, Froyo and Mario KartPortrayed byAnnaleigh Ashford Gina Dabrowskiis the deuteragonist in (Season 1) and protagonist in (Season 2) onCBScomedy seriesB Positive. She is played byAnnaleigh Ashford. Gina is a working-class woman who is larger than life in every sense – most importantly, her heart. She lives in her mother's basement, drives a senior citizen van for a living, and makes rash decisions, including givingDrewher kidney. 
She’s now the manager of the senior center in Season 2, after someone dies & gave her a check of $24m.[1]

characters.name: Harry Milton
characters.description: Harry MiltonBiographical informationResidenceValley HillsMarital statusWidowedFamilyMeredith Milton(wife, deceased)OccupationResidentPhysical descriptionGenderMaleStatusAliveBehind the scenesFirst appearanceBagels, Billiards and a Magic ShowPortrayed byHector Elizondo Harry Miltonis a main character inB Positive. He is played byHector Elizondo. He is a resident at Valley Hills, who spends all of his time and energy trying to keep his terminally-ill wife, Meredith, comfortable. After Meredith's death, he decides to travel down the road with Drew in the camper van.

characters.name: Jerry Platt
characters.description: Jerry PlattBiographical informationResidenceValley HillsMarital statusDivorcedOccupationDentistPhysical descriptionGenderMaleBehind the scenesFirst appearanceDie AlysisPortrayed byDavid Anthony Higgins Jerry Plattis a main character inB Positive. He is played byDavid Anthony Higgins. Jerry is a divorced dentist who has been in dialysis for over a year. He always sees the glass half-empty, convinced he'll never find a donor; when he does, his body ends up rejecting the donated kidney.

characters.name: Julia Dunbar
characters.description: Julia DunbarBiographical informationMarital statusSingleFamilyMaddie Dunbar(daughter)Drew Dunbar(ex-husband)Unnamed sonOccupationReal-estate agentPhysical descriptionGenderFemaleStatusAliveBehind the scenesFirst appearancePilotLast appearanceLove, Taxes and a KidneyPortrayed bySara Rue Julia Dunbaris a main character inB Positive. She is played bySara Rue. Julia is an ambitious social climber and a local real estate agent. She believes she deserves to live in the fabulous homes she tries to sell. She tried to tolerate her ex-husband Drew's "idiosyncrasies", but she eventually acted out in the form of an affair that led to the two's divorce.[1]

characters.name: Maddie Dunbar
characters.description: Maddie DunbarBiographical informationMarital statusSingleFamilyDrew Dunbar(father)Julia Dunbar(mother)Unnamed brotherPhysical descriptionGenderFemaleStatusAliveBehind the scenesFirst appearancePilotLast appearanceA Dishwasher, a Fire and a Remote ControlPortrayed byIzzy G Madeline "Maddie" Dunbaris a main character inB Positive. She is played byIzzy G. Maddie isDrewandJulia's teenage daughter then a sister of her unnamed brother. Wise beyond her years, Maddie acts as a parent to her parents and brother, who are divorced or somewhere else.[1]

characters.name: Meredith Milton
characters.description: Meredith MiltonBiographical informationResidenceValley HillsMarital statusWidowedFamilyHarry Milton(husband)OccupationResidentPhysical descriptionGenderFemaleStatusDeceasedBehind the scenesFirst appearanceBagels, Billiards and a Magic ShowLast appearanceHeartburn, Woodstock and RibsPortrayed byPriscilla Lopez Meredith Miltonis a main character inB Positive. She is played byPriscilla Lopez. She is a resident at Valley Hills who was dealing with her terminal illness as best as she could while trying to help her husband, Harry, move on. She succumbs to her cancer after a romantic Parisian-themed date with Harry..

characters.name: Norma Goldman
characters.description: Norma GoldmanBiographical informationResidenceValley HillsMarital statusWidowedOccupationCaretaker and retirement homePhysical descriptionGenderFemaleStatusAliveBehind the scenesFirst appearanceDie AlysisPortrayed byLinda Lavin Norma Goldmanis a main character inB Positive. She is played byLinda Lavin. Norma is one of the senior citizens with whom Gina works at a local retirement home. She has a maternal, nurturing relationship with Gina, but she can be fairly randy, irresponsible, and demanding. Part of her close bond with Gina stems from the sad fact that Norma and her daughter (who hasn't been seen on the show) are estranged from each other.
